# FFJOFS_X | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFJOFS_X ](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffjofs_x)

-  FFJOFS_X 

Global Variable# FFJOFS_X

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFJOFS_X: Int32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffjofs_x#Discussion)

Axis and Button field offsets, used in **FFEFFECT.dwTriggerButton** and **FFEFFECT.rgdwAxes[***n***]**.
